title: STATUS 1200W Memphis Steam Iron, Ceramic Soleplate Clothes Iron with Variable Steam, Burst Shot and Self-Clean, White Blue (MEMPHISIRON1PKB4)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 1200W POWER OUTPUT: Offers efficient heat-up and powerful steam performance, making ironing quicker and easier, perfect for tackling even the toughest wrinkles in a variety of fabrics.
3 STEAM SETTINGS: Choose between three steam levels to suit different fabric types, ensuring gentle care for delicate fabrics or powerful steam for heavier garments.
NON-STICK SOLEPLATE: Features a durable, non-stick soleplate that glides effortlessly over all fabric types, preventing fabric snagging and making ironing smoother and more effective.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Weighing only 900 grams, this iron is easy to handle, reducing strain on your wrist while allowing for smooth, comfortable ironing over longer periods.
1.9 METRE CORD LENGTH: The long cord provides added flexibility and freedom of movement, making it easier to reach those hard-to-iron areas without being restricted.
description: Product Description Handle daily ironing quickly and efficiently with the STATUS Memphis Steam Iron. Drawing 1200W from a standard 230V socket, the ceramic soleplate heats in seconds and maintains even temperature while steam vents deliver up to twenty grams per minute of continuous moisture. A fingertip trigger releases a focused fifty gram burst for stubborn creases, and the same function freshens jackets or curtains vertically when you are short on time. The pearl ceramic surface glides smoothly across delicate synthetics and robust denim alike, and a self-clean feature flushes mineral deposits to keep performance high. Anti-drip protection prevents water spots at lower settings, and an adjustable thermostat pairs with variable steam control so every fabric receives the right care. At just 0.9kg, the Memphis model is easy to manoeuvre and store, perfect for small flats, caravans or quick touch-ups before meetings. Fill the 200ml tank, set your fabric and let STATUS help you achieve crisp, professional-looking results without heavy equipment or high energy costs. Box Contains 1 x Status Memphis 1300w Steam Iron
